privileged_info_summary: This is a synthetic sheet metal flat pattern design task with predefined geometric specifications. The part is a rectangular tray with base dimensions 120mm × 80mm and 25mm flanges on all four sides, resulting in a total flat pattern size of 170mm × 130mm. The design includes 4 mounting holes with 6mm diameter, positioned 15mm offset from the bend lines (90mm spacing in X, 50mm spacing in Y). The task requires three layers: CUT_EXTERIOR (white, color index 7), BEND_LINES (yellow, color index 2, dashed linetype), and CUT_HOLES (red, color index 1). All specifications have been verified against the task setup script and internal consistency checks.
